ab: Hmuya ka karac jiyax sayang?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: Smriyu ka hidaw do mtalux ka karac da.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: Mskuy ka nganguc hug?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: Mskuy bi, lkusi egu hari lukus.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: Mtalu ka nganguc hug?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: Ini! Sbgihur da, mltu ka karac.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: Hmuya ka karac jiyax sayang.
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: Ini ka kskuy ni ini ka kcilux uri, qrasun bi.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: Hmuya ka karac keeman sayang?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: Ungac rulung ka karac, nii smriyu ka ppngrah da.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc hug?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: Msuwal sayang bi, smbu ka hidaw do smriyu ka hakaw utux da.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: Hmuya ka karac namu hiya hug?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?

ab: Sbgihur paru ka yami hini.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: Isu hiya o ya malu ka karac jiyax sayang hug?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: Malu! Smbu hidaw da.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: Musa ku meuyas sapah pyasan da.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: Mskuy bi ka karac, lkusi egu hari lukus.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: Musa ku nganguc da.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: Pquyux paru kiya da, iya shungi madas bubung.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: Pquyux hug?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: Bruwa da, pquyux bi kiya da.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: Qmuyux da?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: Qmnuyux ka suni, msuwal ka sayang da.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: Qmuyux da?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: Mhuriq ka elug, saw bi qmnuyux da.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: Qmuyux hug? Ma mhuriq kana ka lukus su?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: Gaga qmuyux ka nganguc, ini ku adas bubung.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: Ya su malu hug?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: Sbgihur paru, maku mnarux ka tunux mu.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: Ya su malu hug?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: Smbu paru hidaw maku tkuni ka tunux mu.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
